description: Track anything, find the patterns that shape your life Perfice is your self-tracking and improvement companion! Empowering you to log different aspects of your life and see how they correlate with each other. Heavily customizable to help suit your needs. Trackables Track anything—sleep, mood, even... bathroom visits. Logging is fast and flexible. Visualize your data with clean charts and tables. Export effortlessly to CSV or JSON when you need it. Analytics Uncover what really makes a difference. Explore correlations between what you track. Spot patterns that affect your well-being, like how your mood shifts by day of the week. Goals Stay focused with smart, custom goals. Combine multiple metrics into powerful formulas. Track progress automatically as you log, and stay motivated with visual streaks. Tags Tag your day in a tap. Headache? Super social? Tags let you quickly capture key experiences without breaking your flow. Dashboard Your entire life, at a glance. Arrange and resize widgets to build a dashboard that works for you. It’s your space—make it yours. Integrations Integrations such as Android Health Connect allows you to automatically pull in health data from your wearables and find meaningful correlations.
